taxonomy_v3: Engineering and Development, Software Engineering, Java Developer
core_skills: Java, SQL, NoSQL, Spring Framework, Spring Boot
skill_match_scores: Java:1.0, SQL:1.0, NoSQL:1.0, Spring Framework:1.0, Spring Boot:1.0
must_have_quals: 4+ years of related experience required; BS/MS degree preferred or equivalent experience, 3+ years of professional hands-on experience developing and reviewing Java code, with a focus on clean, maintainable design, Experience working with SQL and NoSQL databases (e.g., Oracle, MongoDB), Experience using Spring or Spring Boot frameworks, Experience designing and implementing RESTful APIs and microservices, ideally in a cloud‑based environment, Experience developing CI/CD pipelines with tools such as Bamboo, GitHub Actions, Jenkins, CircleCI, or Travis CI, Understanding of distributed systems, integration patterns (e.g., RabbitMQ, Kafka), and unit testing frameworks (e.g., JUnit), Strong analytical, problem‑solving, and communication skills with the ability to collaborate effectively in an Agile environment
preferred_quals: Experience using AI tools to enhance code quality, automate testing, or accelerate development, Familiarity with cloud‑native development or containerization (Docker, Kubernetes), Experience with monitoring and performance engineering tools (e.g., AppDynamics, Splunk, Grafana, DataDog, PCF metrics), Experience with test‑driven development (TDD), behavior‑driven development (BDD), or frameworks such as Cucumber or Selenium, Front‑end development experience with Angular or React, Cross‑functional communication and collaboration
core_responsibilities: Contribute to the design, development, and implementation of cross‑functional, multi‑platform application systems, Deliver high‑quality, testable code using secure development practices and modern engineering standards, Participate in constructive and inclusive code reviews that encourage learning and shared ownership, Build Proof‑of‑Concept solutions and reusable patterns to accelerate development and innovation, Prepare and maintain architecture, design, and system documentation; collaborate with architects to ensure alignment and approvals, Coordinate with onshore and offshore engineering partners in a respectful and collaborative manner, Develop CI/CD pipelines using tools such as Bamboo and GitHub Actions, Write and maintain automated unit tests to support high‑quality delivery, Participate fully in Agile ceremonies and contribute to a culture of continuous improvement and psychological safety
job_summary: Charles Schwab is a financial services company focused on innovative solutions for workplace financial well-being. They are seeking a skilled Java Developer to contribute to the design and implementation of multi-platform application systems while collaborating with diverse teams to enhance software quality and delivery.
